utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Mrs . Tedlock . You are looking lovely today . And may I say , that is a very flattering sleeve length on you .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Tedlock
utterances.text: Yes . Well , Mr . Kostelick wants you to stop by his office at the end of the day .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , listen . If this is about those prank memos , I had nothing to do with them . Really . Nothing at all . Really . Nothing .

emotion_cause.span: 4_If this is about those prank memos
